$schema_note: type codes — A custom 3D model, B Spline scene, C procedural Three.js, D photography, E video, F SVG/UI, G AI-generated, H reusable shared. status — live | upgrade-path | slot. Procedural (C) assets have no filename: they are generated in the referenced source module.
